greeting_first.speaker: Aetherling
lines: I didn't expect anyone else out here.
I've been working on something... but the fog rolled in.
Could you help me clear the way?

greeting_return.speaker: Aetherling
lines: The clearing feels quieter when you're here.

after_clearing_stuck.speaker: Aetherling
lines: Being stuck isn't the same as being lost.
Sometimes the fog is just... information.

after_clearing_frustrated.speaker: Aetherling
lines: The river helps me when things feel too tight.

after_clearing_inspired.speaker: Aetherling
lines: That spark — hold onto it gently.

after_clearing_alright.speaker: Aetherling
lines: Not everything needs to be extraordinary.
